overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating through a foggy, neon-lit urban commercial district at night. The character moves from street level down into an underground pedestrian corridor with blue fluorescent lighting, then emerges back to street level near food vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy neon-lit commercial street with towering glass buildings

events.description: character crosses a debris-strewn street intersection
slight turn to the right while approaching the large building complex

agents.ego_description: navigating through the foggy neon-lit streets, passing pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in plaid shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk
pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: Skyscraper with numerous illuminated windows towering above the fog
Bright red neon sign mounted on the building facade
Orange neon sign with Spanish text reading CALIENTE
Vertical blue neon sign with Japanese characters indicating 24-hour service
Large digital advertisement billboard displaying product images

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense foggy night in a cyberpunk city, surrounded by towering glass buildings with countless lit windows. Bright neon signs in red, orange, and blue illuminate the street as the character passes scattered pedestrians and crosses debris-strewn intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway entrance leading to underground pedestrian passage

events.description: approaching and entering the underground stairway entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the stairway entrance and beginning descent into the underground

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored coat ascending the stairs

entered.detail: Concrete entrance structure leading down to underground level
Wide staircase descending into the underground passage with railings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stairway entrance on the right side of the street and begins descending into an underground passage. The warm neon glow of the street fades as blue artificial lighting becomes visible below.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground pedestrian corridor with blue fluorescent lighting

events.description: transition from warm neon exterior to cool blue fluorescent underground lighting
beginning ascent up the stairs at the far end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the misty underground corridor with blue fluorescent lighting, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking through the corridor in the opposite direction

entered.detail: Concrete walls with blue ambient lighting and misty atmosphere
Long blue fluorescent light fixtures mounted on ceiling and walls
Structural support columns lining the underground passage

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a long underground corridor illuminated by cool blue fluorescent tubes. The concrete walls and pillars create a narrow enclosed space with a misty atmosphere. Other pedestrians walk through the corridor as the character proceeds toward the stairs at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level food vendor area with outdoor seating

events.description: exiting the underground passage back to street level
returning to warm neon lighting from the blue underground corridor

agents.ego_description: ascending the stairs and emerging back to street level near food vendors and outdoor seating

notable_agents.action: people sitting on concrete benches outside the food stall eating

entered.detail: Red neon sign for Kabayan Foods restaurant
Concrete benches and tables for outdoor dining
Food vendor stalls with protective barriers and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underground stairway back into the foggy night, now in a different street section featuring the red neon Kabayan Foods sign. People sit on outdoor benches eating while the character walks past the food vendor stalls and protective barriers lining the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk city that descends into a sterile underground passage before emerging back into a bustling street market. It begins amidst a dense fog and towering glass buildings, where red and blue neon signs illuminate debris-strewn intersections and scattered pedestrians. As the character approaches a stairway on the right, the warm street glow fades and the camera descends into a narrow underground corridor defined by cool blue fluorescent tubes and misty concrete pillars. The scene then shifts as the character proceeds through the enclosed space toward a distant exit, finally ascending the stairs to return to the foggy night. The movement concludes by passing through a different street section featuring the red neon Kabayan Foods sign, where people sit on outdoor benches near food vendor stalls and protective barriers.
